message:
Add is/is not operators, metaclass keyword, **kwargs support

- is/is not identity comparison operators (x is y, x is not y)
- metaclass keyword in class definitions: class C(metaclass=type)
- **kwargs double-star parameter parsing: def f(**kwargs)
- Fixes 'Expected RParen, got Ident/Eq' and 'Expected Ident, got DoubleStar' errors
